triaged.description: Initial Oz triage has been completed for this issue

bug.description: Something is not working as expected

needs-info.description: The issue needs more information before it can be triaged confidently

repro:high.description: The report looks highly reproducible from the available information

repro:medium.description: The report looks partially reproducible but has some uncertainty

repro:low.description: The report looks difficult to reproduce from the available information

repro:unknown.description: There is not enough information to estimate reproducibility

area:workflow.description: GitHub workflows, Python automation, or Oz integration
